name: obsidian-diagram-popup
description: Show mermaid diagrams in a draggable and resizable popup

scripts.install-plugin: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const vault=process.argv[1]||process.env.OBSIDIAN_VAULT;if(!vault){console.error('Error: OBSIDIAN_VAULT environment variable not set and no vault path provided');process.exit(1);}const pluginId='mermaid-popup';const targetDir=path.join(vault,'.obsidian','plugins',pluginId);fs.mkdirSync(targetDir,{recursive:true});['main.js','manifest.json','styles.css'].forEach(file=>{const src=path.join(__dirname,file);const dest=path.join(targetDir,file);if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dest);console.log('Copied '+file);}else{console.warn('Warning: '+file+' not found');}});console.log('Plugin installed to '+targetDir);"
